questions.question: Define regression analysis and explain its importance in machine learning.
keyPoints: Models relationship between dependent and independent variables
Used for prediction, inference, and trend analysis
Foundation for many advanced ML techniques

questions.question: Compare and contrast regression and classification with examples.
keyPoints: Different loss functions and evaluation metrics

questions.question: Describe the key assumptions of linear regression and why they matter.
keyPoints: Linearity: relationship between X and Y is linear
Violations can lead to biased or unreliable results

questions.question: Explain different types of regression and when each is appropriate.
keyPoints: Multiple: when multiple predictors are relevant
Ridge/Lasso: when regularization is needed for overfitting
Logistic: for classification despite regression name
